inline_comments.message:
Same remark as in other commits - use ansible_os_family. And then it will suffice to:

- include_tasks: "{{ ansible_os_family }}".yml

and
 ansible/roles/docker/tasks/RedHat.yml
 ansible/roles/docker/tasks/Debian.yml

But in fact include isn't needed at all, please see comments in tasks/ubuntu.yml

Just define a map in role's defaults similar to:

packages:
 RedHat:
  -pkg1
 Debian:
  -pkg1
  -pkg2

And then directly in main.yml loop over it:

- name: Install required packages
  package:	
    name: "{{ item }}"
  loop: "{{ packages[ansible_os_family] }}"

No conditional includes and separate task files needed.
